daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: Subway services faced disruptions across multiple lines during the evening rush hour, while deep flooding on Rockaway Boulevard in Queens created challenges for drivers; additionally, Staten Islanders protested against plans for a homeless shelter on the South Shore.

risks_alerts.title: Risks & Alerts
risks_alerts.summary_md:
### Risks & Alerts

- Subway service disrupted on many lines due to various issues during evening rush hour. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Deep flooding on part of Rockaway Boulevard in Queens caused problems for some drivers. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
